meta.title: Results & Patient Experience — Vincor
meta.description: View measurable treatment results and patient experiences at Vincor. Discover how our 4D diagnostics and splint therapy change lives.

hero.title: Results & Patient Experience
hero.description: Measurable improvement, experienced by our patients

caseStudies.title: Patient Journeys
caseStudies.description: Three anonymized case studies showing how a disturbed bite can cause various complaints — and how we bring change.

cases.title: From chronic migraine to a life without headaches
cases.imageAlt: Female patient with chronic migraine successfully treated at Vincor
cases.complaint: Migraine 3-4 times per week, for 8 years. No medication helped structurally.
cases.diagnosis: The 4D scan showed clear asymmetry in jaw position and compensation in the cervical spine.
cases.result: After 3 months: migraine reduced from 3-4 times per week to 1 time per month. After 6 months: almost migraine-free.

cases.title: Back pain that no one could explain
cases.imageAlt: Male patient with chronic back pain successfully treated at Vincor
cases.complaint: Chronic lower back pain and stiff neck, for 5 years. Physiotherapy offered only temporary relief.
cases.diagnosis: The DIERS 4D scan showed that a disturbed jaw position caused compensation in the thoracic and lumbar spine.
cases.treatment: Phase 1 → Phase 2, combined with posture therapy at Balans Rugcentrum.
cases.result: 70% reduction in back pain after 4 months. Can sport again without complaints.

cases.title: Teeth grinding and the consequences I didn't see
cases.imageAlt: Female patient with teeth grinding and tinnitus successfully treated at Vincor
cases.complaint: Severe teeth grinding, jaw pain when getting up, tinnitus and neck stiffness.
cases.diagnosis: Combined occlusion analysis and 4D scan showed severe wear and postural imbalance.
cases.treatment: Phase 1 → Phase 2 → Phase 3 (partial reconstruction at PDA)
cases.result: Grinding stopped, tinnitus significantly reduced. New dental build-up provides stable bite and posture.

measurements.title: Measurable difference
measurements.description: At Vincor we use objective 4D measurements to make your progress visible. By comparing the scan at intake with the scan after treatment, we see exactly what has changed.
measurements.imageAlt: DIERS Formetric 4D scan comparison: intake versus after treatment
measurements.subtitle: What do we measure?
measurements.text: The DIERS Formetric 4D scan maps your full posture. By comparing the measurement before and after treatment, we can objectively determine which improvements have been achieved.

parameters.name: Spinal symmetry
parameters.description: deviations in the position of the spine

parameters.name: Pelvic position
parameters.description: tilt and rotation of the pelvis

parameters.name: Shoulder height
parameters.description: difference in height between left and right shoulder

parameters.name: Muscle balance
parameters.description: asymmetry in muscle activity and tension

items.quote: The 4D scan was an eye-opener. Finally I understood why I had headaches for all those years.
items.author: Annelies

items.quote: Professional, thorough and human. At Vincor I felt heard for the first time.
items.author: Tom

items.quote: My physiotherapist should have sent me to Vincor years ago. This was the solution.
items.author: Marieke
